tasks.subject: Task 1: MetricScope tag in eval/ registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add MetricScope.POINTWISE/CROSS_SEAM + Registry.pointwise() so only marginal metrics can enter the objective (spec 5.3, invariant 2).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/core/evaluation.py", "src/sverdrup/eval/accuracy.py", "src/sverdrup/eval/calibration.py", "src/sverdrup/eval/groundtrack.py", "tests/test_metric_scope.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_metric_scope.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["MetricScope enum + metric_scope on Evaluator", "3 evaluators tagged POINTWISE", "Registry.pointwise() filters CROSS_SEAM", "no collision with blend.CoherenceMode.JOINT"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Shared λx helper + refactor their_eval
tasks.description:

```

tasks.subject: Task 3: EffectiveResolution evaluator + test 7

tasks.subject: Task 8: ConstrainedObjective + NoAdmissibleTrial

```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Orchestration loop (tune)
tasks.description:

tasks.subject: Task 11: [USER GATE] Stage A — tuned OI vs challenge end-to-end
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriterion is re-validated independently with captured output.

**Goal:** Real ExecutorTrialScorer + Stage-A driver on OI single-tile; accept winner once via their_eval on c2. Test 1 (loop proven, clears BASELINE, acceptance reports (µ,σ,λx)) + test 2 (their_eval 0 in search / 1 acceptance) + empirical mu_score↔acceptance-µ calibration check.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/scorer.py", "src/sverdrup/application/tuning/stage_a.py", "tests/test_stage_a_end_to_end.py", "tests/validation/fixtures/stage_a_scope.json"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_stage_a_end_to_end.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scorer scores on validation_idx via pointwise registry", "split c2 locked / validation non-c2", "test 1 tuned OI clears BASELINE + acceptance (µ,σ,λx)", "test 2 their_eval 0 search / 1 acceptance", "mu_score vs acceptance-µ calibration recorded"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "stage-A", "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: [USER GATE] Stage B gate — GMRF via BO
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. PAUSED 2026-06-29: enablers committed (516b937), the real multi-hour full-2017 GMRF-via-BO acceptance run is deferred by the owner to a scheduled session.** DONE: strategy seam (_run_stage/run_stage_a/run_stage_b), env-gated gate test (SVERDRUP_STAGE_B_GATE=1), mu_score-before-λx reorder (_assemble_scores, 3 unit tests). nan-check resolved (leaderboard_nrmse bounded [0,1]; only nan was the empty-set default). REMAINING: run full-2017 (set full-year days/time_* in tests/validation/fixtures/stage_a_scope.json) -> capture (µ,σ,λx) Sobol-vs-BO rows -> owner sign-off before Stage C.

Close only after every acceptanceCriterion is re-validated independently with captured output.

**Goal:** GMRF end-to-end with BO; sensible non-regressing acceptance (λx <= 1.25x Sobol); method-agnosticism green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/application/tuning/stage_a.py", "src/sverdrup/application/tuning/stage_b.py", "tests/test_stage_b_gate.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_stage_b_gate.py tests/test_tuning_method_agnostic.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GMRF via BO winner + acceptance", "GMRF (µ,σ,λx) acceptance NUMBER (split-in from Task 12 on 2026-06-29 — own the actual GMRF acceptance here)", "mu_score-before-λx reorder + nan-check (carried from Task 12: confirm GMRF maps but under-resolves vs fails outright)", "BO not regressing λx beyond 1.25x Sobol", "method-agnosticism green"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "stage-B", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
